title: anthemis anthemiformis
intro: Anthemis anthemiformis, also known as chamois or yarrow-leaved chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Anthemis anthemiformis include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers can be used in herbal preparations such as creams and ointments.
